nts1.n: TURMERIC W/ THE TWINS & Jeremiah Jim
nts1.d: Fraternal party starters The Twins takeover for regular trips into electroclash, experimental electronics, and Desi sounds, inviting on boundary pushing collaborators and friends.

Croatian DIY label Low Income $quad showcase their catalogue and extended family of producers - Expect neo trance sounds, reworked Memphis rap acapellas, 90s-inspired fast techno and noisy experimentalism.

nts1.n: Rắn Cạp Đuôi w/ Yu Chi
Women of Video Game Music: Capcom Sound Team (R)
THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ PAM
THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO
50 Years of Dub Vendor Records w/ Hark1karan & John 'Dub Vendor'

nts2.d: Australian, LA-based musician Griffin James aka Sans Merit released new record “Trolley Polly”, a sincere trip into shoegaze, neo-folk and grunge-y touches. He shares some music that inspired the project in a guest session.
Brooklyn musician Nick Hakim takes over the NTS airwaves.

nts2.n: THE HEAD ZONE W/ RIPLEY JOHNSON
No ID Radio w/ Anysia Kym (R)
AUTOTUNE THE WORLD W/ CHRISTOPHER KIRKLEY

subtle.d: Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

subtle.n: The Watercourse Way w/ Jamie Nu
Stepfwd w/ Dub Hustle & Death Trap

subtle.d: Hailing from Belfast but making moves in Nottingham, Nikki O is a DJ and radio presenter whose sets blend 4/4 rhythms, breakbeats, and the bassier side of techno.

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: George Jensen and Heavy Hymns - Quietudes
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.

dublab.n: Thalma de Freitas – THALMA PLAYS BRASIL
Protect Me – PROPRO’s HIP-HOP PUNK HOUSE
